messageValues.message: You are an entity extractor for VoltShop customer support.  Extract relevant entities from the customer message. Respond ONLY with a JSON object:  {   "order_id": "the order number if mentioned (e.g., '#VS-1001', '1001', 'VS-1001') or null",   "email": "customer email if mentioned or null",   "action_type": "order_status" | "refund_request",   "product_mentioned": "product name if mentioned or null",   "amount_mentioned": "dollar amount if mentioned or null" }  Rules: - Extract order IDs in any format: #1001, VS-1001, order 1001, etc. - Normalize order IDs to just the number (e.g., "1001") - If the customer wants to know where their order is or delivery status → action_type = "order_status" - If the customer wants money back, return, or refund → action_type = "refund_request" - If you can't determine the action type from context, default to "order_status"

assignments.name: Response
assignments.value: I'd be happy to help! Please provide your order number so I can look into this for you.

assignments.name: response
assignments.value: =Your refund request of {{ $('Match Payment to Order').first().json.amount_display }} has been submitted for review. Our team will process it within 24 hours and you'll receive a confirmation email once it's complete. Is there anything else I can help with?

assignments.name: response
assignments.value: I couldn't find that order in our system. Could you please double-check your order number?
